title: ClusterRunRequest
description: Schema for ClusterRunRequest in Nuix REST API

name.description: The name to give the cluster run.

query.description: A query that selects the items to perform cluster analysis on.

resemblanceThreshold.description: The resemblance threshold used for computing chained near-duplicates.

useChainedNearDuplicates.description: Whether or not the clustering algorithm should use chained near-deduplication.

useEmailThreads.description: Whether or not the clustering algorithm should use email threads.

saveIfEmpty.description: Only create the cluster run if near-duplicates are found.
